# 📊 Audira AI - Executive Summary

**Ringkasan Analisis Komprehensif untuk Stakeholders**

---

## 🎯 Project Overview

**Audira AI** adalah platform SaaS berbasis cloud yang mengotomatisasi komunikasi WhatsApp dengan kecerdasan buatan. Platform ini dirancang sebagai sistem multi-tenant yang scalable dengan arsitektur microservices modern.

### Key Metrics

| Metrik | Status | Target |
|--------|--------|--------|
| **Versi** | 0.1.0 | 1.0.0 |
| **Completion** | ~30% | 100% |
| **Code Coverage** | ~5% | 80%+ |
| **Services** | 7 | 7 |
| **API Modules** | 32 | 32 |
| **Database Tables** | 50+ | 50+ |
| **Team Size** | 1-2 | 12-15 |

---

## 💡 What's Working Well

### ✅ Architecture Foundation
- **Monorepo Structure**: Turborepo setup dengan workspace yang terorganisir
- **Multi-tenant Design**: Tenant isolation di level database
- **Microservices**: 7 services terpisah dengan tanggung jawab jelas
- **Modern Stack**: Bun, Hono, Next.js 14, TypeScript, Prisma
- **Database Schema**: Comprehensive Prisma schema dengan 50+ models

### ✅ Infrastructure
- **Docker Support**: Docker Compose untuk development
- **CI/CD Pipeline**: GitHub Actions workflow untuk lint, build, docker
- **Database**: PostgreSQL dengan pgvector untuk AI embeddings
- **Caching**: Redis untuk session, cache, job queue
- **Job Queue**: BullMQ untuk background jobs

### ✅ AI Integration
- **OpenAI Integration**: GPT-4o untuk chat completion
- **LangChain**: Framework untuk AI orchestration
- **RAG Pipeline**: Knowledge base dengan vector embeddings
- **Agent Framework**: Tool calling support untuk AI agents

### ✅ Communication
- **WhatsApp Support**: Cloud API + Baileys provider
- **WebSocket**: Socket.IO untuk real-time updates
- **Multi-channel**: Telegram, Discord, Email integration

---

## ⚠️ Critical Issues

### 🔴 High Priority (Must Fix)

#### 1. Incomplete Implementation (30% done)
**Impact**: Cannot deploy to production  
**Effort**: 4-6 weeks

```
Missing Components:
- [ ] Service layer (32 modules need implementation)
- [ ] Input validation (Zod schemas)
- [ ] Error handling (global error handler)
- [ ] Logging system (Winston/Pino)
- [ ] Test coverage (80% target)
- [ ] Frontend UI (most pages not implemented)
- [ ] AI engine (orchestrator incomplete)
- [ ] Workflow engine (executor incomplete)
- [ ] WhatsApp gateway (providers incomplete)
```

#### 2. No Test Coverage
**Impact**: High risk of bugs in production  
**Effort**: 2-3 weeks

```
Current: ~5% (only auth.test.ts)
Target: 80%+

Missing:
- [ ] Unit tests for services
- [ ] Integration tests for API
- [ ] E2E tests for workflows
- [ ] Performance tests
- [ ] Security tests
```

#### 3. Inadequate Error Handling
**Impact**: Poor user experience, hard to debug  
**Effort**: 1-2 weeks

```
Issues:
- [ ] No global error handler
- [ ] No input validation
- [ ] No error logging
- [ ] No error recovery
- [ ] No user-friendly error messages
```

#### 4. Missing Logging
**Impact**: Cannot debug production issues

input.text:
# 🚀 Audira AI - Quick Reference Guide

**Panduan Cepat untuk Developers & DevOps**

---

## 📚 Documentation Index

| Document | Purpose | Audience |
|----------|---------|----------|
| **ANALYSIS.md** | Complete system architecture & overview | Technical leads, architects |
| **IMPLEMENTATION_GUIDE.md** | Setup, development workflow, API docs | Developers |
| **DEVELOPMENT_ROADMAP.md** | Phases, priorities, recommendations | Project managers, leads |
| **ARCHITECTURE_DEEP_DIVE.md** | Design patterns, best practices | Senior developers |
| **EXECUTIVE_SUMMARY.md** | High-level overview & metrics | Stakeholders, management |
| **DEVELOPMENT_CHECKLIST.md** | Task-by-task implementation guide | Developers, QA |
| **QUICK_REFERENCE.md** | This file - quick lookup | Everyone |

---

## ⚡ Quick Start (5 minutes)

```bash
# 1. Clone & install
git clone <repo>
cd audira-ai
pnpm install

# 2. Setup environment
cp .env.example .env
# Edit .env with your values

# 3. Start databases
docker compose up -d postgres redis

# 4. Setup database
pnpm db:generate
pnpm db:push

# 5. Start all services
pnpm dev

# 6. Access services
# Web: http://localhost:3377
# Admin: http://localhost:3379
# API: http://localhost:3378
# AI Engine: http://localhost:3381
```

---

## 🔧 Common Commands

### Development
```bash
pnpm dev                    # Start all services
pnpm dev --filter @audira/api    # Start specific service
pnpm lint                   # Run ESLint
pnpm lint:fix              # Fix linting issues
pnpm type-check            # TypeScript check
pnpm test                  # Run tests
pnpm test:watch            # Watch mode
pnpm test:coverage         # Coverage report
```

### Database
```bash
pnpm db:generate           # Generate Prisma client
pnpm db:push               # Push schema to DB
pnpm db:migrate            # Create migration
pnpm db:seed               # Seed database
pnpm db:studio             # Open Prisma Studio
pnpm db:reset              # Reset database (dev only)
```

### Build & Deploy
```bash
pnpm build                 # Build all services
pnpm clean                 # Clean build artifacts
docker compose build       # Build Docker images
docker compose up -d       # Start with Docker
docker compose down        # Stop services
```

---

## 📁 Project Structure Quick Map

```
audira-ai/
├── apps/
│   ├── api/               → REST API (port 3378)
│   ├── web/               → Main UI (port 3377)
│   ├── admin/             → Admin panel (port 3379)
│   ├── ai-engine/         → AI service (port 3381)
│   ├── whatsapp-gateway/  → WhatsApp (port 3382)
│   ├── workflow-engine/   → Workflows (port 3384)
│   └── desktop/           → Electron app
├── packages/
│   ├── database/          → Prisma schema
│   ├── shared/            → Types & validators
│   ├── ui/                → React components
│   └── config/            → ESLint, TypeScript
└── infrastructure/        → Docker, K8s, Nginx
```

---

## 🔌 API Endpoints Quick Reference

### Authentication
```
POST   /api/v1/auth/login
POST   /api/v1/auth/register
POST   /api/v1/auth/refresh
POST   /api/v1/auth/logout
```

### Contacts
```
GET    /api/v1/contacts
POST   /api/v1/contacts
GET    /api/v1/contacts/:id
PUT    /api/v1/contacts/:id
DELETE /api/v1/contacts/:id
```

### Conversations
```
GET    /api/v1/conversations
POST   /api/v1/conversations
GET    /api/v1/conversations/:id
PUT    /api/v1/conversations/:id
```

### Messages
```
GET    /api/v1/messages
POST   /api/v1/messages
GET    /api/v1/messages/:id
DELETE /api/v1/messages/:id
```

### AI Agents
```
GET    /api/v1/ai-agents
POST   /api/v1/ai-agents
GET    /api/v1/ai-agents/:id
PUT    /api/v1/ai-agents/:id
DELETE /api/v1/ai-agents/:id
POST   /api/v1/ai-agents/:id/execute
```

### Workflows
```
GET    /api/v1/workflows
POST   /api/v1/workflows
GET    /api/v1/workflows/:id
PUT    /api/v1/workflows/:id
DELETE /api/v1/workflows/:id
POST   /api/v1/workflows/:id/activate
POST   /api/v1/workflows/:id/deactivate
```

### AI Engine
```
POST   /ai/chat
POST   /ai/chat/stream
POST   /ai/rag/query
POST   /ai/rag/ingest
POST   /ai/agents/execute
POST   /ai/summarize
POST   /ai/sentiment
POST   /ai/translate
```

---

## 🗄️ Database Quick Reference

### Key Tables
```
users                    → User accounts
tenants                  → Organizations
tenant_members           → User-tenant relationships
contacts                 → Customer contacts
conversations            → Chat conversations
messages                 → Chat messages
whatsapp_sessions        → WhatsApp connections
workflows                → Automation workflows
ai_agents                → AI agent configs
knowledge_bases          → RAG knowledge bases
campaigns                → Broadcast campaigns
deals                    → CRM deals
```

### Common Queries
```typescript
// Get tenant contacts
prisma.contact.findMany({
  where: { tenantId }
})

// Get conversation with messages
prisma.conversation.findUnique({
  where: { id },
  include: { messages: true }
})

// Get active workflows
prisma.workflow.findMany({
  where: { tenantId, status: "ACTIVE" }
})

// Get user with tenant memberships
prisma.user.findUnique({
  where: { id },
  include: { memberships: true }
})
```

---

## 🔐 Environment Variables Quick Reference

```env
# Core
NODE_ENV=development
APP_URL=http://localhost:3377
API_URL=http://localhost:3378

# Database
DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/audira_db
REDIS_URL=redis://localhost:6379

# Auth
JWT_SECRET=your-secret-key
JWT_EXPIRES_IN=15m

# AI
OPENAI_API_KEY=sk-...
OPENAI_MODEL=gpt-4o

# WhatsApp
WHATSAPP_ACCESS_TOKEN=...
WHATSAPP_PHONE_NUMBER_ID=...

# Stripe
STRIPE_SECRET_KEY=sk_test_...

# Email
SMTP_HOST=smtp.gmail.com
SMTP_USER=your-email@gmail.com
SMTP_PASS=your-app-password
```

---

## 🐛 Troubleshooting Quick Guide

### Port Already in Use
```bash
# Find process
lsof -i :3378

# Kill process
kill -9 <PID>

# Or use different port
PORT=3380 pnpm dev --filter @audira/api
```

### Database Connection Error
```bash
# Check if running
docker compose ps postgres

# Start if not running
docker compose up -d postgres

# Check connection string
echo $DATABASE_URL
```

### Prisma Client Not Found
```bash
# Regenerate
pnpm db:generate

# Or reinstall
pnpm install
pnpm db:generate
```

### TypeScript Errors
```bash
# Check types
pnpm type-check

# Fix issues
# Then rebuild
pnpm build
```

### Tests Failing
```bash
# Run specific test
pnpm test -- auth.test.ts

# Watch mode
pnpm test:watch

# Coverage
pnpm test:coverage
```

## 🚀 Deployment Quick Guide

### Docker
```bash
# Build image
docker build -f infrastructure/docker/Dockerfile.api -t audira-api:latest .

# Run container
docker run -p 3378:3378 audira-api:latest

# Push to registry
docker tag audira-api:latest ghcr.io/org/audira-api:latest
docker push ghcr.io/org/audira-api:latest
```

### Kubernetes
```bash
# Create namespace
kubectl create namespace audira

# Deploy
kubectl apply -f infrastructure/kubernetes/ -n audira

# Check status
kubectl get pods -n audira

# View logs
kubectl logs -f deployment/api-deployment -n audira

```

kubectl apply -f infrastructure/kubernetes/production/ -n audira

<file name="f:\AUDIRA-CHAT-AI\README.md" language="markdown" >
<content>
# 🤖 Audira AI - WhatsApp Automation Platform

> Next-generation AI-powered WhatsApp automation SaaS platform

## Tech Stack

- **Frontend**: Next.js 14, React 18, TypeScript, TailwindCSS, shadcn/ui, Framer Motion
- **Backend**: Bun, Hono, Prisma, PostgreSQL, Redis, BullMQ, Socket.IO
- **AI**: OpenAI GPT-4o, LangGraph, pgvector, RAG Pipeline
- **DevOps**: Docker, Kubernetes, GitHub Actions, Nginx

## Project Structure

```
audira-ai-whatsapp-automation/
├── apps/
│   ├── web/                 # Next.js frontend (port 3000)
│   ├── admin/               # Admin dashboard (port 3001)
│   ├── api/                 # Main API server (port 4000)
│   ├── ai-engine/           # AI service (port 4002)
│   ├── whatsapp-gateway/    # WhatsApp service (port 4003)
│   └── workflow-engine/     # Workflow service (port 4004)
├── packages/
│   ├── database/            # Prisma schema & client
│   ├── shared/              # Shared types, validators, utils
│   └── ui/                  # Shared UI components
├── infrastructure/
│   ├── docker/              # Dockerfiles
│   ├── kubernetes/          # K8s manifests
│   ├── nginx/               # Nginx config
│   └── scripts/             # Deployment scripts
├── docs/                    # Documentation
├── .github/workflows/       # CI/CD
├── docker-compose.yml       # Local development
├── turbo.json               # Turborepo config
└── package.json             # Root workspace
```

## Quick Start

### Prerequisites

- Node.js 20+
- Bun 1.1+
- pnpm 9+
- Docker & Docker Compose
- PostgreSQL 16 (or use Docker)
- Redis 7 (or use Docker)

### Setup

```bash
# Clone repository
git clone https://github.com/your-org/audira-ai.git
cd audira-ai

# Install dependencies
pnpm install

# Start databases
docker compose up -d postgres redis

# Setup environment
cp .env.example .env

# Generate Prisma client
pnpm db:generate

# Run migrations
pnpm db:push

# Start all services in development
pnpm dev
```

### Services

| Service | URL | Description |
|---------|-----|-------------|
| Web | http://localhost:3000 | Main frontend |
| Admin | http://localhost:3001 | Admin panel |
| API | http://localhost:4000 | REST + tRPC API |
| AI Engine | http://localhost:4002 | AI services |
| WA Gateway | http://localhost:4003 | WhatsApp gateway |
| Workflows | http://localhost:4004 | Workflow engine |

## Features

- ✅ AI Chatbot (GPT-4o powered)
- ✅ Team Inbox (real-time collaboration)
- ✅ Workflow Automation (visual builder)
- ✅ CRM (contacts, deals, pipelines)
- ✅ Broadcast Campaigns
- ✅ Knowledge Base (RAG)
- ✅ Multi-tenant SaaS
- ✅ RBAC Permissions
- ✅ Real-time Analytics
- ✅ WhatsApp Multi-session

## License

Private - All rights reserved.

</content>
</file>

    "@audira/shared": "workspace:*",

    "@langchain/langgraph": "^0.0.30",
    "@langchain/openai": "^0.2.0",
    "ai": "^3.2.0",
    "hono": "^4.4.0",
    "ioredis": "^5.4.0",
    "openai": "^4.52.0",
    "zod": "^3.23.0"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "typescript": "^5.5.0"
  }
}

<file name="f:\AUDIRA-CHAT-AI\packages\database\prisma\schema.prisma" language="plaintext" >
<content>
generator client {
  provider        = "prisma-client-js"
}

datasource db {
  provider   = "postgresql"
  url        = env("DATABASE_URL")
}

// ============================================
// ENUMS
// ============================================

enum UserRole {
  SUPER_ADMIN
  OWNER
  ADMIN
  AGENT
  VIEWER
  BILLING_MANAGER
}

enum TenantPlan {
  FREE
  STARTER
  PROFESSIONAL
  ENTERPRISE
}

enum ConversationStatus {
  OPEN
  ASSIGNED
  PENDING
  RESOLVED
  CLOSED
}

enum MessageDirection {
  INBOUND
  OUTBOUND
}

enum MessageStatus {
  QUEUED
  SENT
  DELIVERED
  READ
  FAILED
}

enum MessageType {
  TEXT
  IMAGE
  VIDEO
  AUDIO
  DOCUMENT
  LOCATION
  CONTACT
  STICKER
  TEMPLATE
  INTERACTIVE
}

enum WhatsAppProvider {
  CLOUD_API
  BAILEYS
  TWILIO
}

enum SessionStatus {
  CONNECTING
  CONNECTED
  DISCONNECTED
  BANNED
}

enum CampaignStatus {
  DRAFT
  SCHEDULED
  RUNNING
  PAUSED
  COMPLETED
  FAILED
}

enum WorkflowStatus {
  DRAFT
  ACTIVE
  PAUSED
  ARCHIVED
}

enum WorkflowExecutionStatus {
  RUNNING
  COMPLETED
  FAILED
  CANCELLED
}

enum PipelineStage {
  NEW_LEAD
  QUALIFIED
  PROPOSAL
  NEGOTIATION
  WON
  LOST
}

enum AgentType {
  SALES
  MARKETING
  SUPPORT
  REMINDER
  CRM
  CUSTOM
}

enum NotificationType {
  MESSAGE
  ASSIGNMENT
  MENTION
  SYSTEM
  CAMPAIGN
  WORKFLOW
}

// ============================================
// CORE MODELS
// ============================================

model User {
  id                String    @id @default(cuid())
  email             String    @unique
  passwordHash      String?
  name              String
  avatar            String?
  phone             String?
  emailVerified     Boolean   @default(false)
  twoFactorEnabled  Boolean   @default(false)
  twoFactorSecret   String?
  lastLoginAt       DateTime?
  createdAt         DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt         DateTime  @updatedAt

  // Relations
  memberships         TenantMember[]
  sessions            UserSession[]
  devices             UserDevice[]
  passwordResetTokens PasswordResetToken[]
  assignedChats       Conversation[]   @relation("AssignedAgent")
  messages            Message[]        @relation("SentByUser")
  internalNotes       InternalNote[]
  activities          Activity[]
  notifications       Notification[]
  auditLogs           AuditLog[]
  internalMessages    InternalMessage[] @relation("InternalMessageSender")

  @@map("users")
}

model UserSession {
  id           String   @id @default(cuid())
  userId       String
  token        String   @unique
  refreshToken String   @unique
  expiresAt    DateTime
  ipAddress    String?
  userAgent    String?
  createdAt    DateTime @default(now())

  user User @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@map("user_sessions")
}

model UserDevice {
  id         String   @id @default(cuid())
  userId     String
  deviceName String
  deviceType String
  lastUsedAt DateTime @default(now())
  trusted    Boolean  @default(false)
  createdAt  DateTime @default(now())

  user User @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@map("user_devices")
}

model PasswordResetToken {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  userId    String
  token     String   @unique
  expiresAt DateTime
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())

  user User @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@map("password_reset_tokens")
}

// ============================================
// MULTI-TENANT
// ============================================

model Tenant {
  id          String     @id @default(cuid())
  name        String
  slug        String     @unique
  logo        String?
  domain      String?
  plan        TenantPlan @default(FREE)
  settings    Json       @default("{}")
  metadata    Json       @default("{}")
  createdAt   DateTime   @default(now())
  updatedAt   DateTime   @updatedAt

  // Relations
  members          TenantMember[]
  whatsappSessions WhatsAppSession[]
  contacts         Contact[]
  conversations    Conversation[]
  campaigns        Campaign[]
  workflows        Workflow[]
  aiAgents         AIAgent[]
  knowledgeBases   KnowledgeBase[]
  pipelines        Pipeline[]
  apiKeys          ApiKey[]
  webhooks         Webhook[]
  subscription     Subscription?
  invoices         Invoice[]
  auditLogs        AuditLog[]
  analytics        AnalyticsEvent[]
  telegramBots     TelegramBot[]
  discordBots      DiscordBot[]

  @@map("tenants")
}

model TenantMember {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId  String
  userId    String
  role      UserRole @default(AGENT)
  joinedAt  DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt

  tenant Tenant @relation(fields: [tenantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  user   User   @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@unique([tenantId, userId])
  @@map("tenant_members")
}

// ============================================
// WHATSAPP
// ============================================

model WhatsAppSession {
  id           String          @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId     String
  name         String
  phone        String?
  provider     WhatsAppProvider
  status       SessionStatus   @default(CONNECTING)
  credentials  Json?
  metadata     Json            @default("{}")
  lastActiveAt DateTime?
  createdAt    DateTime        @default(now())
  updatedAt    DateTime        @updatedAt

  tenant        Tenant         @relation(fields: [tenantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  conversations Conversation[]
  messages      Message[]

  @@map("whatsapp_sessions")
}

// ============================================
// CONTACTS & CRM
// ============================================

model Contact {
  id              String   @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId        String
  phone           String
  name            String?
  email           String?
  avatar          String?
  tags            String[] @default([])
  status          String   @default("ACTIVE")
  source          String?
  lastContactedAt DateTime?
  metadata        Json     @default("{}")
  lastSeenAt      DateTime?
  createdAt       DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt       DateTime @updatedAt

  tenant        Tenant         @relation(fields: [tenantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  conversations Conversation[]
  deals         Deal[]
  activities    Activity[]
  campaignRecipients CampaignRecipient[]

  @@unique([tenantId, phone])
  @@map("contacts")
}

model Pipeline {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId  String
  name      String
  stages    Json     @default("[]")
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt

  tenant Tenant @relation(fields: [tenantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  deals  Deal[]

  @@map("pipelines")
}

model Deal {
  id         String        @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId   String
  contactId  String
  pipelineId String
  title      String
  value      Float         @default(0)
  stage      PipelineStage @default(NEW_LEAD)
  probability Float        @default(0)
  closedAt   DateTime?
  createdAt  DateTime      @default(now())
  updatedAt  DateTime      @updatedAt

  contact  Contact  @relation(fields: [contactId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  pipeline Pipeline @relation(fields: [pipelineId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@map("deals")
}

model Activity {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId  String
  contactId String?
  userId    String?
  type      String
  title     String
  content   String?
  metadata  Json     @default("{}")
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())

  contact Contact? @relation(fields: [contactId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)
  user    User?    @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)

  @@map("activities")
}

// ============================================
// CONVERSATIONS & MESSAGES
// ============================================

model Conversation {
  id              String             @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId        String
  contactId       String
  sessionId       String
  assignedAgentId String?
  channel         String             @default("WHATSAPP")
  status          ConversationStatus @default(OPEN)
  subject         String?
  tags            String[]           @default([])
  priority        String             @default("NORMAL")
  lastMessageAt   DateTime?
  resolvedAt      DateTime?
  firstResponseAt DateTime?
  metadata        Json               @default("{}")
  createdAt       DateTime           @default(now())
  updatedAt       DateTime           @updatedAt

  tenant        Tenant          @relation(fields: [tenantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  contact       Contact         @relation(fields: [contactId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  session       WhatsAppSession @relation(fields: [sessionId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  assignedAgent User?           @relation("AssignedAgent", fields: [assignedAgentId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)
  messages      Message[]
  internalNotes InternalNote[]

  @@map("conversations")
}

model Message {
  id             String           @id @default(cuid())
  conversationId String
  sessionId      String
  senderId       String?
  direction      MessageDirection
  type           MessageType      @default(TEXT)
  content        String
  mediaUrl       String?
  metadata       Json             @default("{}")
  status         MessageStatus    @default(QUEUED)
  externalId     String?
  isAI           Boolean          @default(false)
  createdAt      DateTime         @default(now())
  updatedAt      DateTime         @updatedAt

  conversation Conversation    @relation(fields: [conversationId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  session      WhatsAppSession @relation(fields: [sessionId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  sender       User?           @relation("SentByUser", fields: [senderId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)

  @@index([conversationId, createdAt])
  @@map("messages")
}

model InternalNote {
  id             String   @id @default(cuid())
  conversationId String
  userId         String
  content        String
  mentions       String[] @default([])
  createdAt      DateTime @default(now())

  conversation Conversation @relation(fields: [conversationId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  user         User         @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@map("internal_notes")
}

// ============================================
// AI SYSTEM
// ============================================

model AIAgent {
  id           String    @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId     String
  name         String
  type         AgentType
  description  String?
  systemPrompt String
  model        String    @default("gpt-4o")
  temperature  Float     @default(0.7)
  tools        Json      @default("[]")
  isActive     Boolean   @default(true)
  metadata     Json      @default("{}")
  createdAt    DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt    DateTime  @updatedAt

  tenant Tenant @relation(fields: [tenantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@map("ai_agents")
}

model KnowledgeBase {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId  String
  name      String
  description String?
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt

  tenant    Tenant              @relation(fields: [tenantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  documents KnowledgeDocument[]

  @@map("knowledge_bases")
}

model KnowledgeDocument {
  id              String   @id @default(cuid())
  knowledgeBaseId String
  title           String
  content         String
  sourceUrl       String?
  fileType        String?
  chunkCount      Int      @default(0)
  metadata        Json     @default("{}")
  createdAt       DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt       DateTime @updatedAt

  knowledgeBase KnowledgeBase      @relation(fields: [knowledgeBaseId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  chunks        DocumentChunk[]

  @@map("knowledge_documents")
}

model DocumentChunk {
  id         String    @id @default(cuid())
  documentId String
  content    String
  embedding  String?
  metadata   Json      @default("{}")
  chunkIndex Int
  createdAt  DateTime  @default(now())

  document KnowledgeDocument @relation(fields: [documentId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@map("document_chunks")
}

// ============================================
// WORKFLOWS
// ============================================

model Workflow {
  id          String         @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId    String
  name        String
  description String?
  status      WorkflowStatus @default(DRAFT)
  trigger     Json
  nodes       Json           @default("[]")
  edges       Json           @default("[]")
  settings    Json           @default("{}")
  createdAt   DateTime       @default(now())
  updatedAt   DateTime       @updatedAt

  tenant     Tenant              @relation(fields: [tenantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  executions WorkflowExecution[]

  @@map("workflows")
}

model WorkflowExecution {
  id         String                  @id @default(cuid())
  workflowId String
  status     WorkflowExecutionStatus @default(RUNNING)
  input      Json                    @default("{}")
  output     Json?
  error      String?
  startedAt  DateTime                @default(now())
  finishedAt DateTime?

  workflow Workflow              @relation(fields: [workflowId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  logs     WorkflowExecutionLog[]

  @@map("workflow_executions")
}

model WorkflowExecutionLog {
  id          String   @id @default(cuid())
  executionId String
  nodeId      String
  nodeName    String?
  status      String
  input       Json?
  output      Json?
  error       String?
  duration    Int?
  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())

  execution WorkflowExecution @relation(fields: [executionId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@map("workflow_execution_logs")
}

// ============================================
// CAMPAIGNS
// ============================================

model Campaign {
  id          String         @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId    String
  name        String
  description String?
  status      CampaignStatus @default(DRAFT)
  template    Json
  scheduledAt DateTime?
  startedAt   DateTime?
  completedAt DateTime?
  stats       Json           @default("{}")
  createdAt   DateTime       @default(now())
  updatedAt   DateTime       @updatedAt

  tenant     Tenant              @relation(fields: [tenantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  recipients CampaignRecipient[]

  @@map("campaigns")
}

model CampaignRecipient {
  id         String        @id @default(cuid())
  campaignId String
  contactId  String
  status     MessageStatus @default(QUEUED)
  sentAt     DateTime?
  deliveredAt DateTime?
  readAt     DateTime?
  error      String?

  campaign Campaign @relation(fields: [campaignId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  contact  Contact  @relation(fields: [contactId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@map("campaign_recipients")
}

// ============================================
// BILLING
// ============================================

model Subscription {
  id                String   @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId          String   @unique
  stripeCustomerId  String?
  stripeSubId       String?
  plan              TenantPlan @default(FREE)
  status            String   @default("active")
  currentPeriodStart DateTime?
  currentPeriodEnd   DateTime?
  cancelAtPeriodEnd  Boolean  @default(false)
  metadata          Json     @default("{}")
  createdAt         DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt         DateTime @updatedAt

  tenant Tenant @relation(fields: [tenantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@map("subscriptions")
}

model Invoice {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId  String
  amount    Float
  currency  String   @default("usd")
  status    String   @default("pending")
  stripeId  String?
  paidAt    DateTime?
  metadata  Json     @default("{}")
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())

  tenant Tenant @relation(fields: [tenantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@map("invoices")
}

// ============================================
// API & WEBHOOKS
// ============================================

model ApiKey {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId  String
  name      String
  key       String   @unique
  scopes    String[] @default([])
  lastUsedAt DateTime?
  expiresAt DateTime?
  isActive  Boolean  @default(true)
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())

  tenant Tenant @relation(fields: [tenantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@map("api_keys")
}

model Webhook {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId  String
  url       String
  events    String[] @default([])
  secret    String
  isActive  Boolean  @default(true)
  metadata  Json     @default("{}")
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt

  tenant Tenant @relation(fields: [tenantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@map("webhooks")
}

// ============================================
// NOTIFICATIONS & AUDIT
// ============================================

model Notification {
  id        String           @id @default(cuid())
  userId    String
  type      String
  title     String
  body      String?
  data      Json             @default("{}")
  readAt    DateTime?
  createdAt DateTime         @default(now())

  user User @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@index([userId, readAt])
  @@map("notifications")
}

model AuditLog {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId  String?
  userId    String?
  action    String
  entity    String
  entityId  String?
  changes   Json?
  ipAddress String?
  userAgent String?
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())

  tenant Tenant? @relation(fields: [tenantId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)
  user   User?   @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)

  @@index([tenantId, createdAt])
  @@map("audit_logs")
}

// ============================================
// ANALYTICS
// ============================================

model AnalyticsEvent {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId  String
  event     String
  data      Json     @default("{}")
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())

  tenant Tenant @relation(fields: [tenantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@index([tenantId, event, createdAt])
  @@map("analytics_events")
}

// ============================================
// TELEGRAM
// ============================================

model TelegramBot {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId  String
  botId     String
  username  String
  name      String
  token     String
  isActive  Boolean  @default(true)
  webhookUrl String?
  metadata  Json     @default("{}")
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt

  tenant Tenant @relation(fields: [tenantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@unique([tenantId, botId])
  @@map("telegram_bots")
}

// ============================================
// DISCORD
// ============================================

model DiscordBot {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId  String
  botId     String
  username  String
  name      String
  token     String
  guildId   String?
  channelId String?
  isActive  Boolean  @default(true)
  metadata  Json     @default("{}")
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt

  tenant Tenant @relation(fields: [tenantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@unique([tenantId, botId])
  @@map("discord_bots")
}

// ============================================
// CANNED RESPONSES
// ============================================

model CannedResponse {
  id          String   @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId    String
  shortcut    String
  title       String
  content     String
  category    String   @default("support")
  createdById String?
  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt   DateTime @updatedAt

  @@unique([tenantId, shortcut])
  @@map("canned_responses")
}

// ============================================
// SCHEDULED MESSAGES
// ============================================

model ScheduledMessage {
  id               String   @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId         String
  conversationId   String
  content          String
  scheduledAt      DateTime
  status           String   @default("pending")
  recurring        Boolean  @default(false)
  recurringPattern String?
  sentAt           DateTime?
  createdById      String?
  createdAt        DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt        DateTime @updatedAt

  @@index([tenantId, status, scheduledAt])
  @@map("scheduled_messages")
}

// ============================================
// MESSAGE TEMPLATES
// ============================================

model MessageTemplate {
  id          String   @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId    String
  name        String
  content     String
  variables   String[] @default([])
  category    String   @default("utility")
  channel     String   @default("whatsapp")
  createdById String?
  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt   DateTime @updatedAt

  @@unique([tenantId, name])
  @@map("message_templates")
}

// ============================================
// CONTACT SEGMENTS
// ============================================

model Segment {
  id          String   @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId    String
  name        String
  description String?
  conditions  Json     @default("[]")
  createdById String?
  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt   DateTime @updatedAt

  @@unique([tenantId, name])
  @@map("segments")
}

// ============================================
// CSAT SURVEYS
// ============================================

model CsatSurvey {
  id             String    @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId       String
  conversationId String
  sentById       String?
  rating         Int?
  comment        String?
  status         String    @default("sent")
  sentAt         DateTime  @default(now())
  respondedAt    DateTime?
  createdAt      DateTime  @default(now())

  @@index([tenantId, status])
  @@map("csat_surveys")
}

// ============================================
// CHATBOT FLOWS
// ============================================

model ChatbotFlow {
  id              String   @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId        String
  name            String
  status          String   @default("draft")
  triggerKeywords String[] @default([])
  nodes           Json     @default("[]")
  edges           Json     @default("[]")
  createdById     String?
  createdAt       DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt       DateTime @updatedAt

  @@map("chatbot_flows")
}

// ============================================
// TEAM INTERNAL CHAT
// ============================================

model InternalMessage {
  id          String   @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId    String
  senderId    String
  recipientId String?
  content     String
  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())

  sender User @relation("InternalMessageSender", fields: [senderId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@index([tenantId, createdAt])
  @@map("internal_messages")
}

// ============================================
// SECURITY
// ============================================

model IpWhitelist {
  id          String   @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId    String
  ip          String
  label       String?
  description String?
  createdById String?
  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())

  @@unique([tenantId, ip])
  @@map("ip_whitelist")
}

model SsoConfig {
  id           String   @id @default(cuid())
  tenantId     String   @unique
  provider     String
  clientId     String
  clientSecret String
  domain       String
  enabled      Boolean  @default(false)
  createdAt    DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt    DateTime @updatedAt

  @@map("sso_configs")
}

</content>

<file name="f:\AUDIRA-CHAT-AI\docker-compose.yml" language="dockercompose" >
<content>
version: "3.9"

services:
  # ============ DATABASES ============
  postgres:
    image: pgvector/pgvector:pg16
    container_name: audira-postgres
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      POSTGRES_USER: postgres
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: postgres
      POSTGRES_DB: audira_db
    ports:
      - "5432:5432"
    volumes:
      - postgres_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U postgres"]
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 5

  redis:
    image: redis:7-alpine
    container_name: audira-redis
    restart: unless-stopped
    command: redis-server --maxmemory 256mb --maxmemory-policy allkeys-lru
    ports:
      - "6379:6379"
    volumes:
      - redis_data:/data
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "redis-cli", "ping"]
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 5

  # ============ APPS (Production) ============
  api:
    build:
      context: .
      dockerfile: infrastructure/docker/Dockerfile.api
    container_name: audira-api
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "3378:3378"
    environment:
      - PORT=3378
      - DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:postgres@postgres:5432/audira_db
      - REDIS_URL=redis://redis:6379
      - JWT_SECRET=audira-super-secret-jwt-key-2024
      - JWT_REFRESH_SECRET=audira-refresh-secret-key-2024
      - AI_ENGINE_URL=http://ai-engine:3381
      - APP_URL=http://localhost:3377
      - ADMIN_URL=http://localhost:3379
    depends_on:
      postgres:
        condition: service_healthy
      redis:
        condition: service_healthy

  web:
    build:
      context: .
      dockerfile: infrastructure/docker/Dockerfile.web
    container_name: audira-web
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "3377:3377"
    environment:
      - NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://localhost:3378/api/v1
      - NEXT_PUBLIC_SOCKET_URL=http://localhost:3378
    depends_on:
      - api

  admin:
    build:
      context: .
      dockerfile: infrastructure/docker/Dockerfile.web
    container_name: audira-admin
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "3379:3379"
    environment:
      - PORT=3379
    depends_on:
      - api

  ai-engine:
    build:
      context: .
      dockerfile: infrastructure/docker/Dockerfile.ai-engine
    container_name: audira-ai-engine
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "3381:3381"
    environment:
      - AI_ENGINE_PORT=3381
      - DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:postgres@postgres:5432/audira_db
      - REDIS_URL=redis://redis:6379
      - OPENAI_API_KEY=${OPENAI_API_KEY:-sk-placeholder}
      - OPENAI_MODEL=gpt-4o
    depends_on:
      postgres:
        condition: service_healthy
      redis:
        condition: service_healthy

  whatsapp-gateway:
    build:
      context: .
      dockerfile: infrastructure/docker/Dockerfile.whatsapp-gateway
    container_name: audira-whatsapp-gateway
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "3382:3382"
    environment:
      - PORT=3382
      - DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:postgres@postgres:5432/audira_db
      - REDIS_URL=redis://redis:6379
      - API_URL=http://api:3378
    depends_on:
      postgres:
        condition: service_healthy
      redis:
        condition: service_healthy

  # ============ MIGRATION (run once) ============
  migrate:
    build:
      context: .
      dockerfile: infrastructure/docker/Dockerfile.api
    container_name: audira-migrate
    command: sh -c "cd packages/database && npx prisma db push --accept-data-loss && npx prisma generate"
    environment:
      - DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:postgres@postgres:5432/audira_db
    depends_on:
      postgres:
        condition: service_healthy
    restart: "no"

volumes:
  postgres_data:
  redis_data:

</content>
</file>

<file name="f:\AUDIRA-CHAT-AI\.github\workflows\ci.yml" language="yaml" >
<content>
name: CI/CD Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, develop]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]

env:
  NODE_VERSION: "20"
  BUN_VERSION: "1.1"

jobs:
  lint-and-typecheck:
    name: Lint & Type Check
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - uses: oven-sh/setup-bun@v2
        with:
          bun-version: ${{ env.BUN_VERSION }}

      - uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4
        with:
          version: 9

      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
          cache: "pnpm"

      - run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
      - run: pnpm lint
      - run: pnpm type-check

  build:
    name: Build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: lint-and-typecheck
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - uses: oven-sh/setup-bun@v2
        with:
          bun-version: ${{ env.BUN_VERSION }}

      - uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4
        with:
          version: 9

      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
          cache: "pnpm"

      - run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
      - run: pnpm build

  docker:
    name: Build Docker Images
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'
    strategy:
      matrix:
        service: [api, web, ai-engine, whatsapp-gateway, workflow-engine]
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v3

      - uses: docker/login-action@v3
        with:
          registry: ghcr.io
          username: ${{ github.actor }}
          password: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

      - uses: docker/build-push-action@v5
        with:
          context: .
          file: infrastructure/docker/Dockerfile.${{ matrix.service }}
          push: true
          tags: ghcr.io/${{ github.repository }}/audira-${{ matrix.service }}:latest
          cache-from: type=gha
          cache-to: type=gha,mode=max

</content>
</file>

input.text:
# 👥 Team Onboarding Guide

**Panduan Lengkap untuk Onboarding Tim Development Audira AI**

---

## 📋 Overview

Dokumen ini memandu proses onboarding untuk tim development yang akan mengerjakan Audira AI. Setiap anggota tim harus menyelesaikan checklist ini dalam 2 hari pertama.

---

## 🎯 Onboarding Timeline

- **Day 1**: Setup & Documentation
- **Day 2**: Environment & First Task
- **Week 1**: Phase 1 Implementation

---

## 📅 Day 1: Setup & Documentation

### Morning (2 hours)

#### 1. Welcome & Overview (30 min)
- [ ] Welcome meeting dengan team lead
- [ ] Project overview presentation
- [ ] Team introduction
- [ ] Communication channels setup

**Deliverable**: Understanding of project scope

#### 2. Documentation Review (1.5 hours)
- [ ] Read EXECUTIVE_SUMMARY.md (15 min)
- [ ] Read QUICK_REFERENCE.md (10 min)
- [ ] Read ANALYSIS.md (30 min)
- [ ] Read IMPLEMENTATION_GUIDE.md (15 min)

**Deliverable**: Understanding of architecture

### Afternoon (2 hours)

#### 3. Environment Setup (1 hour)
- [ ] Clone repository
  ```bash
  git clone https://github.com/your-org/audira-ai.git
  cd audira-ai
  ```

- [ ] Install dependencies
  ```bash
  pnpm install
  ```

- [ ] Setup environment file
  ```bash
  cp .env.example .env
  # Edit .env with provided values
  ```

- [ ] Verify Node.js version
  ```bash
  node --version  # Should be v20+
  ```

- [ ] Verify Bun installation
  ```bash
  bun --version  # Should be 1.1+
  ```

**Deliverable**: Local environment ready

#### 4. Database Setup (1 hour)
- [ ] Start PostgreSQL
  ```bash
  docker compose up -d postgres
  ```

- [ ] Start Redis
  ```bash
  docker compose up -d redis
  ```

- [ ] Generate Prisma client
  ```bash
  pnpm db:generate
  ```

- [ ] Push schema to database
  ```bash
  pnpm db:push
  ```

- [ ] Verify database connection
  ```bash
  pnpm db:studio
  ```

**Deliverable**: Database ready

#### 5. IDE Configuration (30 min)
- [ ] Install VS Code extensions
  - [ ] ESLint
  - [ ] Prettier
  - [ ] TypeScript
  - [ ] Thunder Client (or Postman)
  - [ ] Git Graph

- [ ] Configure VS Code settings
  ```json
  {
    "editor.formatOnSave": true,
    "editor.defaultFormatter": "esbenp.prettier-vscode",
    "[typescript]": {
      "editor.defaultFormatter": "esbenp.prettier-vscode"
    }
  }
  ```

**Deliverable**: IDE configured

---

## 📅 Day 2: Environment & First Task

### Morning (2 hours)

#### 1. Services Startup (30 min)
- [ ] Start all services
  ```bash
  pnpm dev
  ```

- [ ] Verify all services running
  - [ ] Web: http://localhost:3377
  - [ ] Admin: http://localhost:3379
  - [ ] API: http://localhost:3378
  - [ ] AI Engine: http://localhost:3381

- [ ] Check health endpoints
  ```bash
  curl http://localhost:3378/api/v1/health
  ```

**Deliverable**: All services running

#### 2. Code Review (1.5 hours)
- [ ] Review ARCHITECTURE_DEEP_DIVE.md (30 min)
- [ ] Review DEVELOPMENT_CHECKLIST.md (30 min)
- [ ] Review PHASE_1_ACTION_PLAN.md (30 min)

**Deliverable**: Understanding of implementation plan

### Afternoon (2 hours)

#### 3. First Task: Setup Auth Service (2 hours)

**Task**: Create basic AuthService structure

```typescript
// apps/api/src/modules/auth/service.ts

import { prisma } from "@audira/database"
import { logger } from "../../lib/logger"

export class AuthService {
  async login(email: string, password: string) {
    logger.info("Login attempt", { email })
    
    // TODO: Implement login logic
    throw new Error("Not implemented")
  }

  async register(email: string, password: string, name: string) {
    logger.info("Register attempt", { email, name })
    
    // TODO: Implement register logic
    throw new Error("Not implemented")
  }
}
```

**Checklist**:
- [ ] Create file: `apps/api/src/modules/auth/service.ts`
- [ ] Create class: `AuthService`
- [ ] Add methods: `login`, `register`
- [ ] Add logging
- [ ] Commit to feature branch
- [ ] Create pull request

**Deliverable**: First PR submitted

#### 4. Git Workflow Training (30 min)
- [ ] Create feature branch
  ```bash
  git checkout -b feature/auth-service-setup
  ```

- [ ] Make changes
- [ ] Stage changes
  ```bash
  git add apps/api/src/modules/auth/service.ts
  ```

- [ ] Commit with clear message
  ```bash
  git commit -m "feat: create auth service structure"
  ```

- [ ] Push to remote
  ```bash
  git push origin feature/auth-service-setup
  ```

- [ ] Create pull request
  ```bash
  gh pr create --title "Create auth service structure"
  ```

**Deliverable**: First PR created

---

## 📚 Required Reading

### Day 1 (2 hours)
1. **EXECUTIVE_SUMMARY.md** (15 min)
   - Project overview
   - Key metrics
   - Timeline

2. **QUICK_REFERENCE.md** (10 min)
   - Quick commands
   - Common issues
   - API reference

3. **ANALYSIS.md** (30 min)
   - Architecture overview
   - Tech stack
   - Data model

4. **IMPLEMENTATION_GUIDE.md** (15 min)
   - Setup instructions
   - Development workflow
   - Troubleshooting

### Day 2 (1.5 hours)
1. **ARCHITECTURE_DEEP_DIVE.md** (30 min)
   - Design patterns
   - Best practices
   - Code organization

2. **DEVELOPMENT_CHECKLIST.md** (30 min)
   - Phase 1 tasks
   - Quality metrics
   - Success criteria

3. **PHASE_1_ACTION_PLAN.md** (30 min)
   - Week-by-week plan
   - Daily tasks
   - Deliverables

---

## 🔧 Essential Commands

### Development
```bash
pnpm dev              # Start all services
pnpm lint             # Run linter
pnpm lint:fix         # Fix linting issues
pnpm type-check       # TypeScript check
pnpm test             # Run tests
pnpm test:watch       # Watch mode
pnpm build            # Build all services
```

### Database
```bash
pnpm db:generate      # Generate Prisma client
pnpm db:push          # Push schema to DB
pnpm db:migrate       # Create migration
pnpm db:studio        # Open Prisma Studio
pnpm db:seed          # Seed database
```

### Git
```bash
git checkout -b feature/name           # Create branch
git add .                              # Stage changes
git commit -m "feat: description"      # Commit
git push origin feature/name           # Push
gh pr create --title "Title"           # Create PR
```

### Docker
```bash
docker compose up -d postgres          # Start PostgreSQL
docker compose up -d redis             # Start Redis
docker compose ps                      # Check status
docker compose logs -f postgres        # View logs
docker compose down                    # Stop services
```

---

## 👥 Team Structure

### Backend Team (5-6 people)
- **Tech Lead**: Architecture, code review, decisions
- **Senior Backend Engineer**: Core services, complex logic
- **Mid-level Backend Engineers**: Feature implementation
- **Junior Backend Engineers**: Bug fixes, documentation

### Frontend Team (4-5 people)
- **Senior Frontend Engineer**: Architecture, components
- **Mid-level Frontend Engineers**: Feature implementation
- **Junior Frontend Engineers**: UI components, styling

### AI/ML Team (2-3 people)
- **AI Engineer**: AI agents, RAG, orchestration
- **ML Engineers**: Model optimization, training

### DevOps Team (1-2 people)
- **DevOps Engineer**: Infrastructure, CI/CD, deployment

---

## 📞 Communication Channels

### Daily Communication
- **Slack**: #audira-dev (general), #audira-backend, #audira-frontend
- **Standup**: 9:00 AM daily (15 min)
- **Office Hours**: 2:00 PM daily (30 min)

### Weekly Meetings
- **Monday**: Sprint planning (1 hour)
- **Wednesday**: Architecture review (1 hour)
- **Friday**: Sprint retrospective (1 hour)

### Escalation
- **Tech Lead**: Technical issues, code review
- **Engineering Manager**: Resource allocation, blockers
- **CTO**: Architecture decisions
- **CEO**: Strategic decisions

---

## 🎯 First Week Goals

### Day 1-2: Onboarding
- [ ] Complete onboarding checklist
- [ ] Setup local environment
- [ ] Read documentation
- [ ] Submit first PR

### Day 3-5: Phase 1 Start
- [ ] Implement Auth service
- [ ] Implement Contacts service
- [ ] Write unit tests
- [ ] Code review & merge

### Week 1 Deliverable
- [ ] 2 services implemented
- [ ] 100% test coverage
- [ ] 2 PRs merged
- [ ] Ready for Week 2

---

## ✅ Onboarding Checklist

### Day 1
- [ ] Welcome meeting attended
- [ ] Documentation read (2 hours)
- [ ] Repository cloned
- [ ] Dependencies installed
- [ ] Environment file created
- [ ] Database setup complete
- [ ] IDE configured
- [ ] All services running

### Day 2
- [ ] Services verified running
- [ ] Architecture documentation reviewed
- [ ] First task completed
- [ ] First PR created
- [ ] Git workflow understood
- [ ] Team introductions complete
- [ ] Communication channels joined

### Week 1
- [ ] First PR merged
- [ ] Second PR created
- [ ] 100% test coverage achieved
- [ ] Code review process understood
- [ ] Ready for Phase 1 tasks

---

## 🚀 Getting Help

### Common Issues

#### Port Already in Use
```bash
# Find process
lsof -i :3378

# Kill process
kill -9 <PID>

# Or use different port
PORT=3380 pnpm dev --filter @audira/api
```

#### Database Connection Error
```bash
# Check if running
docker compose ps postgres

# Start if not running
docker compose up -d postgres

# Check connection string
echo $DATABASE_URL
```

#### Prisma Client Not Found
```bash
# Regenerate
pnpm db:generate

# Or reinstall
pnpm install
pnpm db:generate
```

### Getting Support
- **Quick questions**: Ask in Slack
- **Technical issues**: Contact tech lead
- **Blockers**: Contact engineering manager
- **Architecture questions**: Contact CTO

---

## 📋 Onboarding Feedback

After completing onboarding, please provide feedback:

1. **What went well?**
   - Setup process
   - Documentation
   - Team support

2. **What could be improved?**
   - Documentation clarity
   - Setup process
   - Communication

3. **Any blockers?**
   - Technical issues
   - Environment setup
   - Understanding

**Feedback form**: [Link to form]

---

## 🎓 Learning Resources

### Official Documentation
- [Hono](https://hono.dev/)
- [Next.js](https://nextjs.org/docs)
- [Prisma](https://www.prisma.io/docs/)
- [TypeScript](https://www.typescriptlang.org/docs/)
- [Bun](https://bun.sh/docs)

### Internal Documentation
- ANALYSIS.md - System architecture
- IMPLEMENTATION_GUIDE.md - Setup & development
- ARCHITECTURE_DEEP_DIVE.md - Design patterns
- DEVELOPMENT_CHECKLIST.md - Task tracking

### Community
- GitHub Discussions
- Stack Overflow
- Dev.to
- Twitter/X

---

## 📞 Contact Information

| Role | Name | Email | Slack |
|------|------|-------|-------|
| Tech Lead | [Name] | [Email] | @tech-lead |
| Engineering Manager | [Name] | [Email] | @eng-manager |
| CTO | [Name] | [Email] | @cto |
| Product Manager | [Name] | [Email] | @pm |

---

## 🎉 Welcome to the Team!

We're excited to have you on board! This is a challenging but rewarding project. Don't hesitate to ask questions, and remember that everyone on the team is here to help.

**Let's build something amazing together!** 🚀

---

# 🎛️ Admin Panel - Complete Guide **Panduan Lengkap untuk Admin Panel Audira AI** --- ## 📋 Overview Admin Panel adalah aplikasi web untuk mengelola seluruh sistem Audira AI. Dibangun dengan **Next.js 14**, **TypeScript**, dan **Tailwind CSS**. **Status**: ⚠️ Belum diimplementasikan (0%) **Priority**: 🔴 High (Phase 4) **Timeline**: Weeks 13-16 (4 minggu) **Team**: 3-4 frontend engineers --- ## 🎯 Admin Panel Features ### 1. Dashboard **Purpose**: Overview sistem dan metrics #### Metrics Display ```typescript // Dashboard metrics - Total Users: 1,234 - Active Conversations: 567 - Messages Today: 12,345 - AI Agents: 45 - Workflows: 89 - System Uptime: 99.9% - API Response Time: 145ms - Database Queries: 2,345/sec ``` #### Real-time Charts - User growth (line chart) - Message volume (bar chart) - AI agent usage (pie chart) - System performance (gauge) - Error rate (line chart) - API latency (area chart) #### Quick Actions - Create new user - Create new AI agent - Create new workflow - View recent errors - View system logs --- ### 2. User Management **Purpose**: Kelola users dan permissions #### User List ```typescript interface UserListView { columns: [ 'ID', 'Name', 'Email', 'Role', 'Status', 'Created', 'Actions' ] filters: { search: string role: 'admin' | 'manager' | 'user' status: 'active' | 'inactive' | 'suspended' dateRange: [Date, Date] } actions: [ 'View', 'Edit', 'Suspend', 'Delete', 'Reset Password' ] } ``` #### User Details - Profile information - Contact details - Role & permissions - API keys - Activity log - Login history #### User Creation ```typescript interface CreateUserForm { name: string email: string password: string role: 'admin' | 'manager' | 'user' permissions: string[] status: 'active' | 'inactive' } ``` #### Bulk Operations - Import users (CSV) - Export users (CSV/Excel) - Bulk role assignment - Bulk status update - Bulk delete --- ### 3. Tenant Management **Purpose**: Kelola multi-tenant configuration #### Tenant List ```typescript interface TenantListView { columns: [ 'ID', 'Name', 'Plan', 'Users', 'Status', 'Created', 'Actions' ] filters: { search: string plan: 'free' | 'pro' | 'enterprise' status: 'active' | 'inactive' | 'suspended' } } ``` #### Tenant Details - Company information - Subscription plan - Billing information - API quota - Storage usage - User count - Feature access #### Tenant Configuration - Custom branding - API keys - Webhooks - Rate limits - Storage limits - Feature flags --- ### 4. AI Agent Management **Purpose**: Kelola AI agents #### Agent List ```typescript interface AgentListView { columns: [ 'ID', 'Name', 'Type', 'Status', 'Conversations', 'Success Rate', 'Created', 'Actions' ] filters: { search: string type: 'chatbot' | 'assistant' | 'workflow' status: 'active' | 'inactive' | 'training' } } ``` #### Agent Details - Configuration - Training data - Performance metrics - Conversation history - Error logs - Usage statistics #### Agent Builder - Visual agent configuration - Tool selection - Prompt customization - Model selection - Parameter tuning - Testing interface --- ### 5. Workflow Management **Purpose**: Kelola workflows #### Workflow List ```typescript interface WorkflowListView { columns: [ 'ID', 'Name', 'Trigger', 'Status', 'Executions', 'Success Rate', 'Created', 'Actions' ] } ``` #### Workflow Builder - Visual workflow editor - Drag-and-drop interface - Node types (trigger, action, condition) - Connection management - Testing interface - Version control #### Workflow Execution - Execution history - Execution logs - Error tracking - Performance metrics - Retry management --- ### 6. WhatsApp Gateway Management **Purpose**: Kelola WhatsApp connections #### Gateway List ```typescript interface GatewayListView { columns: [ 'ID', 'Provider', 'Phone Number', 'Status', 'Messages', 'Created', 'Actions' ] providers: [ 'Baileys', 'Twilio', 'WhatsApp Business API' ] } ``` #### Gateway Configuration - Provider selection - Credentials setup - Phone number configuration - Webhook setup - Rate limiting - Message templates #### Gateway Monitoring - Connection status - Message queue - Error logs - Performance metrics - Usage statistics --- ### 7. Contact Management **Purpose**: Kelola contacts #### Contact List ```typescript interface ContactListView { columns: [ 'ID', 'Name', 'Phone', 'Email', 'Tags', 'Status', 'Created', 'Actions' ] filters: { search: string tags: string[] status: 'active' | 'inactive' } } ``` #### Contact Details - Profile information - Conversation history - Tags & segments - Custom fields - Activity log #### Bulk Operations - Import contacts (CSV) - Export contacts (CSV/Excel) - Bulk tagging - Bulk segmentation - Bulk messaging --- ### 8. Conversation Management **Purpose**: Kelola conversations #### Conversation List ```typescript interface ConversationListView { columns: [ 'ID', 'Contact', 'Agent', 'Status', 'Messages', 'Duration', 'Created', 'Actions' ] filters: { search: string agent: string status: 'active' | 'closed' | 'archived' dateRange: [Date, Date] } } ``` #### Conversation Details - Message history - Participant information - Agent assignment - Tags & notes - Attachments - Sentiment analysis #### Conversation Actions - Reassign agent - Add notes - Add tags - Close conversation - Archive conversation - Export conversation --- ### 9. Analytics & Reporting **Purpose**: Analytics dan reporting #### Reports Available 1. **User Analytics** - Active users - New users - User retention - User engagement 2. **Conversation Analytics** - Total conversations - Average duration - Resolution rate - Customer satisfaction 3. **AI Agent Analytics** - Agent performance - Success rate - Average response time - Error rate 4. **WhatsApp Analytics** - Message volume - Delivery rate - Response time - Error rate 5. **Business Analytics** - Revenue - Churn rate - Customer lifetime value - ROI #### Report Features - Custom date ranges - Filtering options - Export to PDF/Excel - Scheduled reports - Email delivery - Data visualization --- ### 10. System Settings **Purpose**: Konfigurasi sistem #### General Settings - System name - Logo & branding - Timezone - Language - Email configuration - SMS configuration #### Security Settings - Password policy - Two-factor authentication - API key management - IP whitelist - Session timeout - Audit logging #### Integration Settings - Webhook configuration - API keys - Third-party integrations - Custom fields - Data retention policy #### Notification Settings - Email notifications - SMS notifications - In-app notifications - Notification templates - Alert rules --- ### 11. Audit & Logs **Purpose**: Audit trail dan system logs #### Audit Log ```typescript interface AuditLog { id: string userId: string action: string resource: string resourceId: string changes: Record timestamp: Date ipAddress: string userAgent: string } ``` #### System Logs - API logs - Error logs - Database logs - Authentication logs - Integration logs #### Log Features - Real-time streaming - Filtering & search - Export to file - Retention policy - Archive management --- ### 12. Help & Support **Purpose**: Help dan support #### Help Center - Documentation - FAQ - Video tutorials - Knowledge base - Search functionality #### Support Tickets - Create ticket - View tickets - Ticket history - Priority levels - Status tracking #### Contact Support - Live chat - Email support - Phone support - Support hours - SLA information --- ## 🏗️ Admin Panel Architecture ### Directory Structure ``` apps/admin/ ├── src/ │ ├── app/ │ │ ├── layout.tsx │ │ ├── page.tsx │ │ ├── dashboard/ │ │ │ ├── page.tsx │ │ │ └── components/ │ │ ├── users/ │ │ │ ├── page.tsx │ │ │ ├── [id]/ │ │ │ └── components/ │ │ ├── tenants/ │ │ ├── agents/ │ │ ├── workflows/ │ │ ├── gateway/ │ │ ├── contacts/ │ │ ├── conversations/ │ │ ├── analytics/ │ │ ├── settings/ │ │ ├── audit/ │ │ └── help/ │ ├── components/ │ │ ├── layout/ │ │ │ ├── Header.tsx │ │ │ ├── Sidebar.tsx │ │ │ └── Footer.tsx │ │ ├── common/ │ │ │ ├── Button.tsx │ │ │ ├── Modal.tsx │ │ │ ├── Table.tsx │ │ │ ├── Form.tsx │ │ │ └── Card.tsx │ │ ├── dashboard/ │ │ ├── users/ │ │ ├── agents/ │ │ └── ... │ ├── hooks/ │ │ ├── useAuth.ts │ │ ├── useApi.ts │ │ ├── useForm.ts │ │ └── ... │ ├── lib/ │ │ ├── api.ts │ │ ├── auth.ts │ │ ├── utils.ts │ │ └── ... │ ├── types/ │ │ ├── index.ts │ │ ├── api.ts │ │ └── ... │ └── styles/ │ └── globals.css ├── public/ ├── package.json └── tsconfig.json ``` ### Technology Stack ```typescript // Frontend Framework - Next.js 14 (App Router) - React 18 - TypeScript // UI Components - Tailwind CSS - Headless UI - Radix UI - React Icons // State Management - TanStack Query (React Query) - Zustand // Forms - React Hook Form - Zod (validation) // Charts & Visualization - Recharts - Chart.js // Tables - TanStack Table (React Table) // Date & Time - date-fns - Day.js // HTTP Client - Axios - SWR // Authentication - NextAuth.js // Development - ESLint - Prettier - Husky - Vitest ``` --- ## 🎨 UI/UX Design ### Design System ```typescript // Colors const colors = { primary: '#3B82F6', // Blue secondary: '#8B5CF6', // Purple success: '#10B981', // Green warning: '#F59E0B', // Amber error: '#EF4444', // Red neutral: '#6B7280', // Gray } // Typography const typography = { h1: { size: '32px', weight: 700 }, h2: { size: '24px', weight: 700 }, h3: { size: '20px', weight: 600 }, body: { size: '16px', weight: 400 }, small: { size: '14px', weight: 400 }, } // Spacing const spacing = { xs: '4px', sm: '8px', md: '16px', lg: '24px', xl: '32px', } // Breakpoints const breakpoints = { mobile: '640px', tablet: '768px', desktop: '1024px', wide: '1280px', } ``` ### Layout Components ```typescript // Main Layout
``` ### Common Components - Button (primary, secondary, danger) - Input (text, email, password, number) - Select (dropdown) - Checkbox - Radio - Toggle - Modal - Alert - Toast - Breadcrumb - Pagination - Loading spinner - Empty state - Error state --- ## 🔐 Authentication & Authorization ### Authentication Flow ```typescript // 1. Login POST /api/v1/auth/login { email: string password: string } // 2. Response { accessToken: string refreshToken: string user: { id: string email: string name: string role: 'admin' | 'manager' | 'user' } } // 3. Store tokens localStorage.setItem('accessToken', accessToken) localStorage.setItem('refreshToken', refreshToken) // 4. Use in requests Authorization: Bearer {accessToken} ``` ### Authorization ```typescript // Role-based access control const permissions = { admin: ['*'], manager: [ 'users:read', 'users:create', 'users:update', 'agents:read', 'agents:create', 'workflows:read', 'workflows:create', 'conversations:read', 'analytics:read', ], user: [ 'agents:read', 'conversations:read', 'analytics:read', ], } // Protected routes ``` --- ## 📱 Responsive Design ### Breakpoints ```typescript // Mobile: < 640px // Tablet: 640px - 1024px // Desktop: > 1024px // Example

``` ### Mobile Considerations - Touch-friendly buttons (min 44px) - Simplified navigation (hamburger menu) - Optimized tables (horizontal scroll) - Stacked forms - Full-width modals --- ## 🚀 Implementation Plan ### Phase 1: Foundation (Week 1) **Goal**: Setup project structure dan basic components #### Tasks - # 🌐 Frontend Web Application - Complete Guide **Panduan Lengkap untuk Frontend Web Audira AI** --- ## 📋 Overview Frontend Web adalah aplikasi web untuk end-users. Dibangun dengan **Next.js 14**, **TypeScript**, dan **Tailwind CSS**. **Status**: ⚠️ Belum diimplementasikan (0%) **Priority**: 🔴 High (Phase 4) **Timeline**: Weeks 13-16 (4 minggu) **Team**: 3-4 frontend engineers --- ## 🎯 Frontend Web Features ### 1. Authentication Pages **Purpose**: User authentication #### Login Page ```typescript interface LoginForm { email: string password: string rememberMe: boolean } // Features - Email/password login - Remember me option - Forgot password link - Sign up link - Social login (optional) - Error handling - Loading state ``` #### Sign Up Page ```typescript interface SignUpForm { name: string email: string password: string confirmPassword: string acceptTerms: boolean } // Features - User registration - Email verification - Password strength indicator - Terms & conditions - Privacy policy - Error handling ``` #### Forgot Password Page ```typescript interface ForgotPasswordForm { email: string } // Features - Email input - Reset link sent confirmation - Resend option - Back to login link ``` #### Reset Password Page ```typescript interface ResetPasswordForm { password: string confirmPassword: string } // Features - Password input - Password strength indicator - Confirmation - Success message ``` #### Two-Factor Authentication ```typescript interface TwoFactorForm { code: string } // Features - 6-digit code input - Resend code option - Backup codes - Remember device option ``` --- ### 2. Dashboard **Purpose**: User dashboard dan overview #### Dashboard Layout ```typescript interface DashboardLayout { header: { greeting: string currentTime: Date notifications: Notification[] } sidebar: { navigation: NavItem[] userProfile: UserProfile } mainContent: { quickStats: QuickStat[] recentConversations: Conversation[] recentAgents: Agent[] upcomingTasks: Task[] } } ``` #### Quick Stats - Total conversations - Active conversations - Messages today - Response time - Customer satisfaction - AI agent performance #### Recent Activity - Recent conversations - Recent agents - Recent workflows - Recent contacts - Activity timeline #### Quick Actions - Start new conversation - Create new agent - Create new workflow - View analytics - Access settings --- ### 3. Chat Interface **Purpose**: Real-time chat dengan AI agents #### Chat Layout ```typescript interface ChatLayout { header: { agentName: string agentStatus: 'online' | 'offline' | 'busy' agentAvatar: string actions: ChatAction[] } messageArea: { messages: Message[] scrollPosition: number } inputArea: { textInput: TextInput attachmentButton: Button sendButton: Button typingIndicator: TypingIndicator } sidebar: { conversationInfo: ConversationInfo participants: Participant[] attachments: Attachment[] notes: Note[] } } ``` #### Message Types - Text messages - Image messages - Video messages - Audio messages - Document messages - Location messages - Contact cards - Quick replies - Suggested actions #### Chat Features - Real-time messaging (WebSocket) - Message history - Search messages - Pin messages - React to messages - Reply to messages - Forward messages - Delete messages - Edit messages - Message status (sent, delivered, read) - Typing indicators - Read receipts - Online status #### Attachments - Image upload - Video upload - Audio upload - Document upload - File preview - Download files - Share files --- ### 4. Conversation Management **Purpose**: Kelola conversations #### Conversation List ```typescript interface ConversationListView { conversations: Conversation[] filters: { search: string agent: string status: 'active' | 'closed' | 'archived' unread: boolean } sorting: { by: 'date' | 'name' | 'status' order: 'asc' | 'desc' } pagination: { page: number pageSize: number total: number } } ``` #### Conversation Item - Contact name & avatar - Last message preview - Last message time - Unread count - Agent assigned - Status badge - Pinned indicator #### Conversation Actions - Archive conversation - Delete conversation - Mute notifications - Pin conversation - Mark as read/unread - Assign agent - Add tags - Add notes #### Conversation Details - Full message history - Participant information - Agent information - Tags & notes - Attachments - Conversation metadata - Sentiment analysis --- ### 5. AI Agent Interface **Purpose**: Interact dengan AI agents #### Agent List ```typescript interface AgentListView { agents: Agent[] filters: { search: string type: 'chatbot' | 'assistant' | 'workflow' status: 'active' | 'inactive' } sorting: { by: 'name' | 'type' | 'status' order: 'asc' | 'desc' } } ``` #### Agent Card - Agent name & avatar - Agent type - Description - Status - Rating - Usage count - Last used - Start conversation button #### Agent Details - Full description - Capabilities - Tools available - Performance metrics - User reviews - Usage statistics - Start conversation button #### Agent Interaction - Start new conversation - View conversation history - Rate agent - Provide feedback - Report issue --- ### 6. Workflow Management **Purpose**: Kelola workflows #### Workflow List ```typescript interface WorkflowListView { workflows: Workflow[] filters: { search: string status: 'active' | 'inactive' | 'draft' trigger: string } sorting: { by: 'name' | 'status' | 'created' order: 'asc' | 'desc' } } ``` #### Workflow Card - Workflow name - Description - Trigger type - Status - Last executed - Execution count - Success rate - Edit button #### Workflow Details - Full description - Trigger configuration - Actions - Conditions - Execution history - Performance metrics - Edit workflow button #### Workflow Execution - View execution history - View execution logs - View execution errors - Retry execution - Cancel execution --- ### 7. Contact Management **Purpose**: Kelola contacts #### Contact List ```typescript interface ContactListView { contacts: Contact[] filters: { search: string tags: string[] status: 'active' | 'inactive' } sorting: { by: 'name' | 'created' | 'lastMessage' order: 'asc' | 'desc' } } ``` #### Contact Card - Contact name & avatar - Phone number - Email - Tags - Last message - Status - View details button #### Contact Details - Profile information - Contact information - Tags & segments - Conversation history - Custom fields - Activity log - Add note button #### Contact Actions - Edit contact - Delete contact - Add tags - Add notes - Start conversation - View history --- ### 8. Analytics & Insights **Purpose**: Analytics dan insights #### Analytics Dashboard ```typescript interface AnalyticsDashboard { dateRange: [Date, Date] metrics: { totalConversations: number activeConversations: number totalMessages: number averageResponseTime: number customerSatisfaction: number agentPerformance: number } charts: { conversationTrend: Chart messageVolume: Chart agentPerformance: Chart customerSatisfaction: Chart responseTime: Chart } } ``` #### Reports - Conversation analytics - Message analytics - Agent performance - Customer satisfaction - Response time analysis - Trend analysis #### Export Options - Export to PDF - Export to Excel - Export to CSV - Schedule reports - Email reports --- ### 9. Settings & Profile **Purpose**: User settings dan profile #### Profile Settings ```typescript interface ProfileSettings { personalInfo: { name: string email: string phone: string avatar: string } preferences: { language: string timezone: string theme: 'light' | 'dark' | 'auto' notifications: NotificationPreferences } security: { password: string twoFactorAuth: boolean apiKeys: ApiKey[] sessions: Session[] } } ``` #### Account Settings - Profile information - Email & phone - Avatar upload - Password change - Two-factor authentication - API keys - Active sessions - Login history #### Preferences - Language selection - Timezone selection - Theme selection - Notification preferences - Email preferences - Privacy settings #### Security - Password change - Two-factor authentication - API key management - Session management - Login history - Device management --- ### 10. Notifications **Purpose**: Real-time notifications #### Notification Types - New message - Agent assigned - Conversation closed - Workflow executed - Error occurred - System update - User mention - Custom notification #### Notification Display - In-app notifications - Toast notifications - Notification center - Email notifications - Push notifications - SMS notifications #### Notification Management - Mark as read - Delete notification - Notification preferences - Notification history - Notification settings --- ### 11. Help & Support **Purpose**: Help dan support #### Help Center - Documentation - FAQ - Video tutorials - Knowledge base - Search functionality - Contact support #### Support Tickets - Create ticket - View tickets - Ticket history - Priority levels - Status tracking - Ticket comments #### Live Chat Support - Live chat with support team - Chat history - Support hours - SLA information --- ### 12. Mobile Responsive **Purpose**: Mobile-friendly interface #### Mobile Features - Responsive design - Touch-friendly interface - Mobile navigation - Mobile chat interface - Mobile notifications - Mobile settings - Offline support --- ## 🏗️ Frontend Web Architecture ### Directory Structure ``` apps/web/ ├── src/ │ ├── app/ │ │ ├── layout.tsx │ │ ├── page.tsx │ │ ├── (auth)/ │ │ │ ├── login/ │ │ │ ├── signup/ │ │ │ ├── forgot-password/ │ │ │ └── reset-password/ │ │ ├── (dashboard)/ │ │ │ ├── dashboard/ │ │ │ ├── chat/ │ │ │ ├── conversations/ │ │ │ ├── agents/ │ │ │ ├── workflows/ │ │ │ ├── contacts/ │ │ │ ├── analytics/ │ │ │ ├── settings/ │ │ │ └── help/ │ ├── components/ │ │ ├── layout/ │ │ │ ├── Header.tsx │ │ │ ├── Sidebar.tsx │ │ │ └── Footer.tsx │ │ ├── common/ │ │ │ ├── Button.tsx │ │ │ ├── Input.tsx │ │ │ ├── Modal.tsx │ │ │ ├── Card.tsx │ │ │ └── ... │ │ ├── auth/ │ │ ├── chat/ │ │ ├── conversations/ │ │ ├── agents/ │ │ ├── workflows/ │ │ ├── contacts/ │ │ ├── analytics/ │ │ └── ... │ ├── hooks/ │ │ ├── useAuth.ts │ │ ├── useApi.ts │ │ ├── useChat.ts │ │ ├── useForm.ts │ │ └── ... │ ├── lib/ │ │ ├── api.ts │ │ ├── auth.ts │ │ ├── websocket.ts │ │ ├── utils.ts │ │ └── ... │ ├── types/ │ │ ├── index.ts │ │ ├── api.ts │ │ └── ... │ ├── store/ │ │ ├── auth.ts │ │ ├── chat.ts │ │ ├── conversations.ts │ │ └── ... │ └── styles/ │ └── globals.css ├── public/ ├── package.json └── tsconfig.json ``` ### Technology Stack ```typescript // Frontend Framework - NextAuth.js // Notifications - React Toastify - React Hot Toast // Development - ESLint - Prettier - Husky - Vitest ``` --- ## 🎨 UI/UX Design ### Design System ```typescript // Colors const colors = { primary: '#3B82F6', // Blue secondary: '#8B5CF6', // Purple success: '#10B981', // Green warning: '#F59E0B', // Amber error: '#EF4444', // Red neutral: '#6B7280', // Gray } // Typography const typography = { h1: { size: '32px', weight: 700 }, h2: { size: '24px', weight: 700 }, h3: { size: '20px', weight: 600 }, body: { size: '16px', weight: 400 }, small: { size: '14px', weight: 400 }, } // Spacing const spacing = { xs: '4px', sm: '8px', md: '16px', lg: '24px', xl: '32px', } // Breakpoints const breakpoints = { mobile: '640px', tablet: '768px', desktop: '1024px', wide: '1280px', } ``` ### Layout Components ```typescript // Main Layout

## 📋 Overview

Mobile App adalah aplikasi native untuk iOS dan Android. Dibangun dengan **React Native** dan **Expo**.

### 1. Authentication

}

// 3. Store tokens
await AsyncStorage.setItem('accessToken', accessToken)
await AsyncStorage.setItem('refreshToken', refreshToken)

// 4. Use in requests
Authorization: Bearer {accessToken}
